queries.question: Give me the focus area in common for all agricultural research institutes.
queries.sql: SELECT Focus_Areas.area_name  from Agricultural_Research_Institutes_Focus_Areas join Focus_Areas on Agricultural_Research_Institutes_Focus_Areas.focus_area_id = Focus_Areas.id join Agricultural_Research_Institutes on Agricultural_Research_Institutes_Focus_Areas.institute_id = Agricultural_Research_Institutes.id   GROUP BY Agricultural_Research_Institutes_Focus_Areas.focus_area_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Agricultural_Research_Institutes_Focus_Areas.institute_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Agricultural_Research_Institutes)

queries.question: For each agricultural research institute, what is the corresponding focus area?
queries.sql: select agricultural_research_institutes.name , focus_areas.area_name from Agricultural_Research_Institutes_Focus_Areas join Focus_Areas on Agricultural_Research_Institutes_Focus_Areas.focus_area_id = Focus_Areas.id join Agricultural_Research_Institutes on Agricultural_Research_Institutes_Focus_Areas.institute_id = Agricultural_Research_Institutes.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?area_name WHERE {
  ?agricultural_research_institutes_focus_areas a :Agricultural_Research_Institutes_Focus_Areas .
  ?focus_areas a :Focus_Areas .
  ?agricultural_research_institutes_focus_areas p:hasFocus_Areas ?focus_areas .
  ?agricultural_research_institutes a :Agricultural_Research_Institutes .
  ?agricultural_research_institutes_focus_areas p:hasAgricultural_Research_Institutes ?agricultural_research_institutes .
  ?agricultural_research_institutes p:name ?name .
  ?focus_areas p:name ?area_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the focus area of each agricultural research institute.
